description:
Hello,

I'd like to book a group tour for my 4th-grade class of 28 students plus 4 chaperones. We're hoping for a weekday morning in early October. Could you let me know availability and the per-student rate?

Thank you,
Diane Merrill
subject: Group tour booking for 4th-grade class

description:
Hi there,

My father uses a wheelchair and we'd like to visit the DC-3 exhibit this weekend. Is that gallery fully accessible, and are there ramps to the boarding platform?

Thanks,
Greg Santana
subject: Wheelchair access at the DC-3 exhibit

description:
Hello,

My annual membership lapsed last month and I'd like to renew at the family level. Can I do that online, or do I need to come to the front desk?

Best,
Patrick Donnelly
subject: Membership renewal question

description:
Hi,

We visited last Saturday and I think I left a blue water bottle near the flight-sim kiosk. Has anything been turned in to lost and found?

Thank you,
Nathan Briggs
subject: Lost item near the flight-sim kiosk

description:
Hello,

What are the museum hours on the upcoming holiday weekend, and is the gift shop open the same hours as the galleries?

Thanks,
Teresa Vaughn
subject: Holiday weekend hours and gift shop

description:
Hi,

I'd like to reserve the WWII gallery for a private evening event for about 40 guests. Could you send pricing and available dates in September?

Regards,
Diane Merrill
subject: Private event rental in the WWII gallery

description:
Hello,

My grandson is interested in the summer aviation camp. What ages do you accept and is there still space in the July session?

Thank you,
Teresa Vaughn
subject: Summer aviation camp registration

description:
Hi,

I'd like to sign up to volunteer as a docent. Could you tell me what the training schedule looks like and how to apply?

Thanks,
Marcus Webb
subject: Becoming a volunteer docent

description:
Hello,

Is tripod photography allowed in the main gallery, or only handheld? I'm working on a piece about the restoration program.

Thanks,
Linda Pruitt
subject: Photography policy for the galleries

description:
Hi,

I made a gift in December and need a receipt for my records. Could you send a copy to my email?

Thank you,
Howard Kim
subject: Donation receipt for tax records

description:
Hello,

I lead a scout troop of 22 and would like to arrange a visit in February. Is there a group rate, and do leaders get in free?

Regards,
Randy Griffin
subject: Bulk ticket order for scout troop

description:
Hi,

I lost my membership card. Can you mail a replacement or do I pick it up at the desk?

Thanks,
Catherine Bond
subject: Replacement membership card

description:
Hello,

We're hosting a veterans appreciation event in March and would love a docent to speak about the warbird collection. Is anyone available?

Thank you,
Mary Gonzalez
subject: Speaker request for veterans event

description:
Hi,

My son turns ten next month and is set on the flight simulator. Can we reserve a session, and how long does it run?

Thanks,
Ian Johnson
subject: Flight simulator session booking

description:
Hello,

I ordered a B-17 model from the online shop two weeks ago and haven't seen a shipping update. Order number is 88142.

Best,
Angela Foster
subject: Gift shop online order status

description:
Hi,

Could you confirm my logged docent hours for the quarter? I need them for a community service form.

Thank you,
Greg Santana
subject: Volunteer hours verification

description:
Hello,

We're driving an RV up from Tucson. Is there parking that fits a 28-foot motorhome on a tour day?

Thanks,
Patrick Donnelly
subject: Parking for an oversized vehicle

description:
Hi,

I signed up for the monthly newsletter but haven't received the last two issues. Could you check my email on file?

Thanks,
Nathan Briggs
subject: Newsletter subscription not arriving

description:
Hello,

I'm researching a relative who flew B-25s and would like to view your logbook archive. Can I schedule an appointment with the archivist?

Regards,
Diane Merrill
subject: Archive research appointment

description:
Hi,

My mother tires easily. Do you have wheelchairs to borrow at the entrance for the duration of a visit?

Thank you,
Teresa Vaughn
subject: Wheelchair loan for elderly visitor
